description:
Offered: every other Fall
The principles and applications of classical electricity, magnetism, and optics are studied using the language of calculus. Credit cannot be earned for both PHYS 2400 and PHYS 2700.
Prerequisite(s): PHYS 2600
Note: Where PHYS 2400 is specified as a requirement, PHYS 2700 may be substituted.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, PL
